extra.reasoning:
The property globally(opted_out implies not sent) is VIOLATED. The flaw is transition t28: on send_attempt, if (opted_out and stage >= 8), it sets sent := true — directly producing a state with opted_out=true and sent=true. The stage counter can be advanced to 8 independently of opted_out, because the key transitions (t3..t24) have no guard on opted_out, and the optout event (t1) does not reset stage. So we can opt out first, then drive the stage machine to 8, then send.
